title: Farmer
description: Useful mod for farmers! Have you ever thought about that you can till and plant, without click the mouse? You only need to move your body and farmland will appear after you! Seeds can plant themselves too!
body: Have you ever thought about it? Farming don't need a steve! The farmland will appear under your feet if you have a hoe in your hand. The seeds can also plant themselves on the farmland! You just need to download this mod and press U or I to toggle auto till and auto plant.
